# Al Masria Group (المصرية جروب)

> Authorized distributor of Toyota genuine parts and oils in Egypt since 1999. Nationwide delivery within 48 hours, plus the MTX aftermarket brand.

Al Masria Group is a leading Egyptian B2B/B2C distributor of Toyota Genuine Parts, Toyota Motor Oils, and the company's own MTX aftermarket replacement parts. Headquartered in Giza with branches across Egypt and a regional hub in Dubai.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Authorized Toyota parts & oils distributor in Egypt.
- [About Us](/about): 25+ years of automotive distribution, branches, leadership.
- [Products Catalog](/products): Full catalog — Toyota genuine, MTX, Denso, Aisin, FBK.
- [Toyota Genuine Parts](/products/genuine-toyota-parts): 100% original parts with dealer warranty.
- [Toyota Oils](/products/toyota-oils): Toyota engine and transmission oils.
- [MTX Aftermarket](/mtx): Al Masria's own brand of premium replacement parts.
- [Toyota Genuine Parts Egypt](/toyota-genuine-parts-egypt): Landing for Egypt market.
- [Contact Us](/contact): WhatsApp, phone, email, branch locations.
- [What Sets Us Apart](/what-sets-us-apart): Authorized status, network, guarantees.
- [Catalogs](/catalogs): Wholesale catalogs for approved dealers.
- [Policies](/policies): Terms, privacy, shipping, returns.
- [Install App](/install): PWA installation guide.
- [Track Order](/track-order): Real-time order tracking.
